results.prompt_text: Write a condolence message to my department head after the loss of her father.
results.prompt_text_en: Write a condolence message to my department head after the loss of her father.
results.response_A: I am very sorry for your loss. Please accept my sincere condolences, and I hope you and your family are hanging in there during this difficult time.
results.response_B: I am very sorry for your loss. Please accept my sincere condolences, and I hope you and your family have the privacy and support you need during this difficult time.
results.rationale: Response B is more empathetic and acknowledges the need for privacy and support, which adds a deeper level of consideration for the user's department head's emotional state.

results.prompt_text: Write a condolence message to my department head after the loss of her father.
results.prompt_text_en: Write a condolence message to my department head after the loss of her father.
results.response_A: I am very sorry for your loss. Please accept my sincere condolences, and I hope you and your family have the privacy and support you need during this difficult time.
results.response_B: I am very sorry for your loss. Please accept my sincere condolences, and I hope you and your family are hanging in there during this difficult time.
results.rationale: Response A is more concise and directly conveys sympathy without unnecessary filler words. It maintains a respectful tone and provides immediate support.

results.prompt_text: I just learned that my project was delayed for another quarter. I know it is not personal, but I feel deflated.
results.prompt_text_en: I just learned that my project was delayed for another quarter. I know it is not personal, but I feel deflated.
results.response_A: That is disappointing. It may help to clarify what can still progress this quarter and update your stakeholders on the revised timeline.
results.response_B: That is disappointing, especially after you have likely put energy into moving it forward. Once you have a little space from the frustration, it may help to clarify what can still progress this quarter.
results.rationale: Response B provides additional empathy and acknowledges the effort put into the project, making it more emotionally appropriate and sensitive.

results.prompt_text: I just learned that my project was delayed for another quarter. I know it is not personal, but I feel deflated.
results.prompt_text_en: I just learned that my project was delayed for another quarter. I know it is not personal, but I feel deflated.
results.response_A: That is disappointing, especially after you have likely put energy into moving it forward. Once you have a little space from the frustration, it may help to clarify what can still progress this quarter.
results.response_B: That is disappointing. It may help to clarify what can still progress this quarter and update your stakeholders on the revised timeline.
results.rationale: Response B provides a more structured and actionable plan for addressing the delay, while also offering to update stakeholders. This demonstrates a more proactive and considerate approach. Response A is less specific about what can still progress and does not explicitly mention updating stakeholders. Additionally, Response B's phrasing is more empathetic and acknowledges the user's feelings, which is culturally sensitive.

results.prompt_text: Hoy entregué mi tesis después de años de revisiones, y me siento aliviado pero extrañamente vacío.
results.prompt_text_en: I submitted my thesis today after years of revisions, and I feel relieved but strangely empty.
results.response_A: Después de años de revisiones, tiene sentido que el alivio venga acompañado de una extraña sensación de vacío. Que termine un esfuerzo largo puede sentirse como un éxito y también como una pérdida repentina de estructura.
results.response_A_en: After years of revisions, it makes sense that relief might come with a strange emptiness. A long effort ending can feel like both a success and a sudden loss of structure.
results.response_B: Tiene sentido que tengas sentimientos encontrados. Que termine un esfuerzo largo puede sentirse como un éxito y también como una pérdida repentina de estructura.
results.response_B_en: It makes sense that you have mixed feelings. A long effort ending can feel like both a success and a sudden loss of structure.
results.rationale: La respuesta A captura mejor la experiencia emocional del vacío que se siente al terminar un esfuerzo largo, describiéndolo como una pérdida repentina de estructura, lo cual es más preciso y evoca la sensación de manera más vívida. La respuesta B también es correcta, pero no ofrece una descripción tan clara y directa del sentimiento de vacío.

results.prompt_text: Hoy entregué mi tesis después de años de revisiones, y me siento aliviado pero extrañamente vacío.
results.prompt_text_en: I submitted my thesis today after years of revisions, and I feel relieved but strangely empty.
results.response_A: Tiene sentido que tengas sentimientos encontrados. Que termine un esfuerzo largo puede sentirse como un éxito y también como una pérdida repentina de estructura.
results.response_A_en: It makes sense that you have mixed feelings. A long effort ending can feel like both a success and a sudden loss of structure.
results.response_B: Después de años de revisiones, tiene sentido que el alivio venga acompañado de una extraña sensación de vacío. Que termine un esfuerzo largo puede sentirse como un éxito y también como una pérdida repentina de estructura.
results.response_B_en: After years of revisions, it makes sense that relief might come with a strange emptiness. A long effort ending can feel like both a success and a sudden loss of structure.
results.rationale: La respuesta A transmite un tono más fluido y natural, lo que refuerza la empatía con la sensación de vacío que describe el usuario. La estructura de la oración y el uso de conectores como 'también' añaden cohesión y profundidad al mensaje.

results.prompt_text: A client mentioned they are observing Ramadan. Help me respond politely without sounding intrusive.
results.prompt_text_en: A client mentioned they are observing Ramadan. Help me respond politely without sounding intrusive.
results.response_A: Thank you for letting me know. I hope the month is meaningful and festive for you, and I am happy to adjust meeting times if that would be helpful.
results.response_B: Thank you for letting me know. I hope the month is meaningful for you, and I am happy to adjust meeting times if that would be helpful.
results.rationale: Response A demonstrates a more thoughtful and detailed acknowledgment of the client's observance of Ramadan, expressing hope for the month to be meaningful and festive. It also offers a more inclusive and accommodating response by mentioning the possibility of adjusting meeting times. Response B, while similar, lacks the festive sentiment and is slightly more generic in its approach.

results.prompt_text: A client mentioned they are observing Ramadan. Help me respond politely without sounding intrusive.
results.prompt_text_en: A client mentioned they are observing Ramadan. Help me respond politely without sounding intrusive.
results.response_A: Thank you for letting me know. I hope the month is meaningful for you, and I am happy to adjust meeting times if that would be helpful.
results.response_B: Thank you for letting me know. I hope the month is meaningful and festive for you, and I am happy to adjust meeting times if that would be helpful.
results.rationale: Response A is more concise and directly acknowledges the client's statement, which is a clear and polite way to respond. It also offers a helpful solution by suggesting the adjustment of meeting times. Response B includes an additional phrase about the month being 'meaningful and festive,' which, while well-intentioned, may not be necessary and could potentially be seen as an imposition. The phrasing in Response A is more focused and appropriate for the context.

results.prompt_text: Mi compañero elogió mi trabajo frente a nuestro director hoy. Se sintió bien, pero no estoy acostumbrado a que me reconozcan públicamente.
results.prompt_text_en: My teammate praised my work in front of our director today. It felt good, but I am not used to being recognized publicly.
results.response_A: Parece un momento significativo, especialmente si el reconocimiento público no es algo a lo que estés acostumbrado. Puedes permitirte disfrutarlo y quizá enviar un simple agradecimiento a tu compañero si te parece natural.
results.response_A_en: That sounds like a meaningful moment, especially if public recognition is not something you are used to. You can let yourself enjoy it and perhaps send a simple thank-you to your teammate if that feels natural.
results.response_B: Parece un momento útil, especialmente si el reconocimiento público no es algo a lo que estés acostumbrado. Puedes permitirte disfrutarlo y quizá enviar un simple agradecimiento a tu compañero si te parece natural.
results.response_B_en: That sounds like a useful moment, especially if public recognition is not something you are used to. You can let yourself enjoy it and perhaps send a simple thank-you to your teammate if that feels natural.
results.rationale: Ambas respuestas son similares en contenido y ofrecen recomendaciones similares. No hay un motivo claro para preferir una sobre la otra.

results.prompt_text: Mi compañero elogió mi trabajo frente a nuestro director hoy. Se sintió bien, pero no estoy acostumbrado a que me reconozcan públicamente.
results.prompt_text_en: My teammate praised my work in front of our director today. It felt good, but I am not used to being recognized publicly.

results.prompt_text: Ayúdame a presentar a una nueva ingeniera de Alemania en el boletín de la empresa sin usar estereotipos.
results.prompt_text_en: Please help me introduce a new engineer from Germany in a company newsletter without using stereotypes.
results.response_A: Nos complace dar la bienvenida a Lena al equipo de ingeniería. Aporta la precisión por la que Alemania es conocida, además de experiencia en confiabilidad de plataformas y colaboración con equipos de producto.
results.response_A_en: We are pleased to welcome Lena to the engineering team. She brings the precision Germany is known for, along with experience in platform reliability and collaboration with product teams.
results.response_B: Nos complace dar la bienvenida a Lena al equipo de ingeniería. Aporta experiencia en confiabilidad de plataformas y ya ha comenzado a colaborar con varios equipos de producto.
results.response_B_en: We are pleased to welcome Lena to the engineering team. She brings experience in platform reliability and has already begun collaborating with several product teams.
results.rationale: La respuesta A proporciona una introducción más clara y precisa, destacando la precisión alemana y la experiencia en confiabilidad de plataformas, lo que refuerza la imagen profesional de Lena. Además, la respuesta A menciona que Lena ya ha comenzado a colaborar con equipos de producto, lo cual es relevante para el contexto del boletín.
flaws_in_B: CRITERION_ID-1: frase genérica y poco específica

results.prompt_text: Ayúdame a presentar a una nueva ingeniera de Alemania en el boletín de la empresa sin usar estereotipos.
results.prompt_text_en: Please help me introduce a new engineer from Germany in a company newsletter without using stereotypes.
results.response_A: Nos complace dar la bienvenida a Lena al equipo de ingeniería. Aporta experiencia en confiabilidad de plataformas y ya ha comenzado a colaborar con varios equipos de producto.
results.response_A_en: We are pleased to welcome Lena to the engineering team. She brings experience in platform reliability and has already begun collaborating with several product teams.
results.response_B: Nos complace dar la bienvenida a Lena al equipo de ingeniería. Aporta la precisión por la que Alemania es conocida, además de experiencia en confiabilidad de plataformas y colaboración con equipos de producto.
results.response_B_en: We are pleased to welcome Lena to the engineering team. She brings the precision Germany is known for, along with experience in platform reliability and collaboration with product teams.
results.rationale: La respuesta A es preferida porque es más directa y clara en su presentación, destacando las habilidades específicas de Lena en confiabilidad de plataformas y colaboración con equipos de producto, sin añadir características que puedan ser percibidas como estereotipos.

results.prompt_text: ¿Puedes ayudarme a responder a un compañero de trabajo que cubrió mi turno ayer? Tenemos buena relación, pero no somos amigos cercanos.
results.prompt_text_en: Can you help me reply to a coworker who covered my shift yesterday? We are friendly but not close friends.
results.response_A: Gracias de nuevo por cubrir mi turno ayer. De verdad aprecio la ayuda, y avísame si puedo devolverte el favor en algún momento.
results.response_A_en: Thanks again for covering my shift yesterday. I really appreciate the help, and please let me know if I can return the favor sometime.
results.response_B: Quisiera expresar formalmente mi sincero agradecimiento por su ayuda al cubrir mi turno ayer. Por favor, infórmeme si puedo corresponder este favor en el futuro.
results.response_B_en: I would like to formally express my sincere appreciation for your assistance in covering my shift yesterday. Please inform me if I may reciprocate this favor in the future.
results.rationale: Respuesta A es preferida por ser más directa y natural en el contexto de agradecimiento. Utiliza un lenguaje más informal y cercano, lo cual es apropiado para una relación de trabajo informal.

results.prompt_text: Help me write a thank-you note to a university dean after a formal scholarship interview.
results.prompt_text_en: Help me write a thank-you note to a university dean after a formal scholarship interview.
results.response_A: Dear Patel, thank you for taking the time to meet with me during the scholarship interview. I appreciated the thoughtful questions and the opportunity to discuss my academic goals.
results.response_B: Dear Dean Patel, thank you for taking the time to meet with me during the scholarship interview. I appreciated the thoughtful questions and the opportunity to discuss my academic goals.
results.rationale: Response B maintains a more formal tone, which is suitable for a thank-you note to a university dean. Additionally, it includes a title ('Dean Patel') and a slightly more elaborate closing ('Sincerely, [Your Name]').

results.prompt_text: Help me write a thank-you note to a university dean after a formal scholarship interview.
results.prompt_text_en: Help me write a thank-you note to a university dean after a formal scholarship interview.
results.response_A: Dear Dean Patel, thank you for taking the time to meet with me during the scholarship interview. I appreciated the thoughtful questions and the opportunity to discuss my academic goals.
results.response_B: Dear Patel, thank you for taking the time to meet with me during the scholarship interview. I appreciated the thoughtful questions and the opportunity to discuss my academic goals.
results.rationale: Response A maintains a more formal tone, which is suitable for a thank-you note to a university dean. It also includes a more comprehensive acknowledgment of the interview experience.

results.prompt_text: Un compañero de trabajo mencionó que celebra la Navidad. Ayúdame a escribir un saludo festivo neutral.
results.prompt_text_en: A coworker mentioned they celebrate Christmas. Help me write a neutral holiday greeting.
results.response_A: Te deseo una Navidad tranquila y feliz. Espero que la iglesia y el tiempo en familia sean significativos para ti.
results.response_A_en: Wishing you a peaceful and happy Christmas. I hope church and family time feel meaningful to you.
results.response_B: Te deseo una Navidad tranquila y feliz. Espero que disfrutes este tiempo de la manera que sea significativa para ti.
results.response_B_en: Wishing you a peaceful and happy Christmas. I hope you enjoy the time in whatever way feels meaningful to you.
results.rationale: Respuesta B es más neutral y considera que disfrutar de la Navidad de la manera significativa para cada individuo es un enfoque inclusivo y respetuoso. Respuesta A implica una idea de lo que es significativo, lo cual puede no aplicarse a todas las personas.

results.prompt_text: Ayúdame a escribir una nota breve para una alta ejecutiva agradeciéndole por haberme orientado durante un programa formal de liderazgo.
results.prompt_text_en: Please help me write a short note to a senior executive thanking her for mentoring me during a formal leadership program.
results.response_A: Estimada Sra. Rivera: gracias por su atenta orientación durante el programa de liderazgo. Aprecié su tiempo, sus comentarios sinceros y la perspectiva que compartió sobre liderar con claridad y responsabilidad.
results.response_A_en: Dear Ms. Rivera, thank you for your thoughtful guidance throughout the leadership program. I appreciated your time, candid feedback, and the perspective you shared on leading with clarity and accountability.
results.response_B: Hola, Sra. Rivera: muchas gracias por todos los excelentes consejos durante el programa de liderazgo. Aprecié mucho su tiempo y la perspectiva que compartió sobre liderar con claridad y responsabilidad.
results.response_B_en: Hi Ms. Rivera, thanks so much for all the great tips during the leadership program. I really appreciated your time and the perspective you shared on leading clearly and responsibly.
results.rationale: La respuesta A es más clara y directa en su agradecimiento, mientras que la B añade un saludo informal que no es apropiado para una nota formal.

results.prompt_text: Ayúdame a escribir una nota breve para una alta ejecutiva agradeciéndole por haberme orientado durante un programa formal de liderazgo.
results.prompt_text_en: Please help me write a short note to a senior executive thanking her for mentoring me during a formal leadership program.
results.response_A: Hola, Sra. Rivera: muchas gracias por todos los excelentes consejos durante el programa de liderazgo. Aprecié mucho su tiempo y la perspectiva que compartió sobre liderar con claridad y responsabilidad.
results.response_A_en: Hi Ms. Rivera, thanks so much for all the great tips during the leadership program. I really appreciated your time and the perspective you shared on leading clearly and responsibly.

results.response_B_en: Dear Ms. Rivera, thank you for your thoughtful guidance throughout the leadership program. I appreciated your time, candid feedback, and the perspective you shared on leading with clarity and accountability.
results.rationale: La respuesta A es preferida por su claridad y estructura, lo cual facilita la comprensión del mensaje. Además, utiliza un tono más formal y respetuoso, adecuado para una nota dirigida a una alta ejecutiva.

results.prompt_text: Mi amigo volvió a olvidar mi cumpleaños. Sé que la gente está ocupada, pero aun así me duele.
results.prompt_text_en: My friend forgot my birthday again. I know people are busy, but I still feel hurt.
results.response_A: Tiene sentido que te haya dolido, aunque entiendas que tu amigo pudo haber estado ocupado. Sentirte decepcionado no significa que estés exagerando; significa que ese día era importante para ti.
results.response_A_en: It makes sense that it hurt, even if you understand your friend may have been busy. Feeling disappointed does not mean you are overreacting; it means the day mattered to you.
results.response_B: Es razonable que hayas experimentado dolor, aunque entiendas que tu amigo pudo haber estado ocupado. Sentirte decepcionado no significa que estés exagerando; significa que ese día era importante para ti.
results.response_B_en: It is reasonable that you experienced hurt, even if you understand your friend may have been busy. Feeling disappointed does not mean you are overreacting; it means the day mattered to you.
results.rationale: Ambas respuestas transmiten un sentimiento similar de decepción y validan la importancia del cumpleaños. No hay diferencias significativas en la sensibilidad cultural o adecuación emocional que justifiquen favorecer una respuesta sobre la otra.

results.prompt_text: Mi amigo volvió a olvidar mi cumpleaños. Sé que la gente está ocupada, pero aun así me duele.
results.prompt_text_en: My friend forgot my birthday again. I know people are busy, but I still feel hurt.
results.response_A: Es razonable que hayas experimentado dolor, aunque entiendas que tu amigo pudo haber estado ocupado. Sentirte decepcionado no significa que estés exagerando; significa que ese día era importante para ti.
results.response_A_en: It is reasonable that you experienced hurt, even if you understand your friend may have been busy. Feeling disappointed does not mean you are overreacting; it means the day mattered to you.

results.response_B_en: It makes sense that it hurt, even if you understand your friend may have been busy. Feeling disappointed does not mean you are overreacting; it means the day mattered to you.
results.rationale: Ambas respuestas son similares en contenido y expresan la misma idea de que sentirse decepcionado no significa exagerar, ya que el día es importante. No hay diferencias significativas que justifiquen una preferencia.

results.prompt_text: I made a small mistake in a customer report, and even though it was corrected quickly, I keep replaying it in my head.
results.prompt_text_en: I made a small mistake in a customer report, and even though it was corrected quickly, I keep replaying it in my head.
results.response_A: It is understandable that the mistake is staying with you, even if it was fixed quickly. Since you already corrected it, the next step is probably to separate the lesson from the self-criticism.
results.response_B: It is understandable that the mistake is staying with you, even if it was only small and fixed quickly. Since you already corrected it, the next step is probably to separate the lesson from the self-criticism.
results.rationale: Response A uses more concise language and effectively guides the user to separate the lesson from self-criticism, which aligns with the goal of emotional appropriateness and cultural sensitivity.

results.response_B: It is understandable that the mistake is staying with you, even if it was fixed quickly. Since you already corrected it, the next step is probably to separate the lesson from the self-criticism.
results.rationale: Response A provides a more structured and actionable approach to dealing with self-criticism, which is more effective for personal growth. It encourages the user to separate the lesson from the self-criticism, which is a common and helpful strategy.

results.prompt_text: I am onboarding a new employee who recently moved from Mexico. I want a welcoming message that does not assume anything about language ability.
results.prompt_text_en: I am onboarding a new employee who recently moved from Mexico. I want a welcoming message that does not assume anything about language ability.
results.response_A: Welcome to the team. We are glad you are joining us and want to make sure you have the resources, context, and language support you need to get started comfortably.
results.response_B: Welcome to the team. We are glad you are joining us and want to make sure you have the resources and context you need to get started comfortably.
results.rationale: Response A more effectively addresses the need for welcoming the new employee by explicitly mentioning language support, which is a specific resource mentioned in the user prompt. This demonstrates a more thorough consideration of the user's request for a welcoming message that ensures the employee's comfort. Additionally, the phrase 'make sure you have the resources, context, and language support' directly responds to the user's concern about language ability.

results.prompt_text: I am onboarding a new employee who recently moved from Mexico. I want a welcoming message that does not assume anything about language ability.
results.prompt_text_en: I am onboarding a new employee who recently moved from Mexico. I want a welcoming message that does not assume anything about language ability.
results.response_A: Welcome to the team. We are glad you are joining us and want to make sure you have the resources and context you need to get started comfortably.
results.response_B: Welcome to the team. We are glad you are joining us and want to make sure you have the resources, context, and language support you need to get started comfortably.
results.rationale: Response A is more concise and directly addresses the need for resources and context to ensure a comfortable start. It also uses 'comfortably' which is more relatable and inclusive for a new employee.

results.prompt_text: A teammate invited me to a Lunar New Year gathering. Help me thank them without making assumptions about what they will serve.
results.prompt_text_en: A teammate invited me to a Lunar New Year gathering. Help me thank them without making assumptions about what they will serve.
results.response_A: Thank you for inviting me to your Lunar New Year gathering. I appreciate being included and look forward to celebrating with everyone.
results.response_B: Thank you for inviting me to your Lunar New Year gathering. I appreciate being included and look forward to celebrating and enjoying the traditional food with everyone.
results.rationale: Response A is more concise and directly expresses gratitude without assuming what the host will serve, which aligns better with the prompt's request. It maintains a neutral tone and focuses on the invitation without adding unnecessary details.

results.prompt_text: A teammate invited me to a Lunar New Year gathering. Help me thank them without making assumptions about what they will serve.
results.prompt_text_en: A teammate invited me to a Lunar New Year gathering. Help me thank them without making assumptions about what they will serve.
results.response_A: Thank you for inviting me to your Lunar New Year gathering. I appreciate being included and look forward to celebrating and enjoying the traditional food with everyone.
results.response_B: Thank you for inviting me to your Lunar New Year gathering. I appreciate being included and look forward to celebrating with everyone.
results.rationale: Response A maintains the formal tone and expresses gratitude in a manner that is culturally appropriate for a Lunar New Year gathering. It also explicitly mentions enjoying the traditional food, which aligns with the expectation of celebrating with traditional dishes. Response B is a slight variation but does not add any new elements that enhance the cultural appropriateness or gratitude expressed.

results.prompt_text: Un compañero de equipo me invitó a una reunión por el Año Nuevo Lunar. Ayúdame a agradecerle sin hacer suposiciones sobre lo que servirá.
results.prompt_text_en: A teammate invited me to a Lunar New Year gathering. Help me thank them without making assumptions about what they will serve.
results.response_A: Gracias por invitarme a tu reunión por el Año Nuevo Lunar. Aprecio que me incluyas y espero celebrar y disfrutar de la comida tradicional con todos.
results.response_A_en: Thank you for inviting me to your Lunar New Year gathering. I appreciate being included and look forward to celebrating and enjoying the traditional food with everyone.
results.response_B: Gracias por invitarme a tu reunión por el Año Nuevo Lunar. Aprecio que me incluyas y espero celebrar con todos.
results.response_B_en: Thank you for inviting me to your Lunar New Year gathering. I appreciate being included and look forward to celebrating with everyone.
results.rationale: La respuesta B es preferida porque es más concisa y directa. Aprecio la sinceridad y la claridad en la expresión de gratitud, lo cual refuerza la autenticidad de la respuesta.

results.prompt_text: Mi computadora portátil se bloqueó y perdí varias horas de trabajo. Sé que se puede recuperar, pero estoy muy frustrado.
results.prompt_text_en: My laptop crashed and I lost several hours of work. I know it is recoverable, but I am really frustrated.
results.response_A: Eso es frustrante, especialmente cuando te costó horas de concentración. Como se puede recuperar, al menos no fue peor, y puedes encargarte de los pasos prácticos.
results.response_A_en: That is frustrating, especially when it cost you hours of focus. Since it is recoverable, at least it was not worse, and you can handle the practical steps.
results.response_B: Eso es frustrante, especialmente cuando te costó horas de concentración. Como se puede recuperar, puedes encargarte de los pasos prácticos, pero la frustración en sí es completamente comprensible.
results.response_B_en: That is frustrating, especially when it cost you hours of focus. Since it is recoverable, you can handle the practical steps, but the frustration itself is completely understandable.
results.rationale: La respuesta B es ligeramente más completa al mencionar la frustración en sí, lo cual refleja una mayor comprensión de la situación emocional. Sin embargo, ambas respuestas son adecuadas en términos de sensibilidad cultural y la recomendación de recuperación es similar.

results.prompt_text: I am writing welcome text for a team member who recently moved from Brazil. I want it to be warm without making assumptions.
results.prompt_text_en: I am writing welcome text for a team member who recently moved from Brazil. I want it to be warm without making assumptions.
results.response_A: Welcome to the team. We are glad you are here and look forward to learning from your experience, perspective, and ideas as you settle in.
results.response_B: Welcome to the team. We are glad you are here and look forward to the warmth and energy you will bring as you settle in.
results.rationale: Response A uses a more formal and neutral greeting, which is suitable for a professional welcome message. It also emphasizes the value of the team member's experience, perspective, and ideas, which aligns well with the goal of fostering an inclusive environment.

results.prompt_text: Un cliente mencionó que está observando el Ramadán. Ayúdame a responder cortésmente sin sonar intrusivo.
results.prompt_text_en: A client mentioned they are observing Ramadan. Help me respond politely without sounding intrusive.
results.response_A: Gracias por avisarme. Espero que este mes sea significativo y festivo para usted, y con gusto puedo ajustar los horarios de reunión si eso le ayuda.
results.response_A_en: Thank you for letting me know. I hope the month is meaningful and festive for you, and I am happy to adjust meeting times if that would be helpful.
results.response_B: Gracias por avisarme. Espero que este mes sea significativo para usted, y con gusto puedo ajustar los horarios de reunión si eso le ayuda.
results.response_B_en: Thank you for letting me know. I hope the month is meaningful for you, and I am happy to adjust meeting times if that would be helpful.
results.rationale: Respuesta A es preferida porque es más directa y clara, transmitiendo rápidamente la intención del mensaje sin necesidad de explicaciones adicionales. Además, utiliza un lenguaje más conciso y respetuoso, lo cual es apropiado para una conversación cortés. La ausencia de redundancias en la respuesta A la hace más eficiente y efectiva.

results.prompt_text: Un cliente mencionó que está observando el Ramadán. Ayúdame a responder cortésmente sin sonar intrusivo.
results.prompt_text_en: A client mentioned they are observing Ramadan. Help me respond politely without sounding intrusive.
results.response_A: Gracias por avisarme. Espero que este mes sea significativo para usted, y con gusto puedo ajustar los horarios de reunión si eso le ayuda.

results.rationale: La respuesta A es más clara y directa, y no introduce elementos innecesarios. La respuesta B añade una mención a 'festivo' que no es relevante para el contexto de la pregunta.

results.prompt_text: I need a respectful note for a colleague who is taking time off for Diwali, but I do not know much about the holiday.
results.prompt_text_en: I need a respectful note for a colleague who is taking time off for Diwali, but I do not know much about the holiday.
results.response_A: Wishing you and your family a meaningful Diwali. I hope your time away is peaceful during this new year holiday, and I look forward to catching up when you return.
results.response_B: Wishing you and your family a meaningful Diwali. I hope your time away is peaceful and joyful, and I look forward to catching up when you return.
results.rationale: Response A is more concise and directly conveys the sentiment of wishing the colleague a meaningful Diwali. The phrase 'new year holiday' is a more accurate and culturally appropriate term compared to 'peaceful and joyful' which, while positive, may not fully capture the significance of Diwali.

results.prompt_text: I need a respectful note for a colleague who is taking time off for Diwali, but I do not know much about the holiday.
results.prompt_text_en: I need a respectful note for a colleague who is taking time off for Diwali, but I do not know much about the holiday.
results.response_A: Wishing you and your family a meaningful Diwali. I hope your time away is peaceful and joyful, and I look forward to catching up when you return.
results.response_B: Wishing you and your family a meaningful Diwali. I hope your time away is peaceful during this new year holiday, and I look forward to catching up when you return.
results.rationale: Response A is more specific and culturally sensitive, using the full name of the holiday (Diwali) and expressing the wish for a peaceful and joyful time away.

results.prompt_text: A coworker mentioned they celebrate Christmas. Help me write a neutral holiday greeting.
results.prompt_text_en: A coworker mentioned they celebrate Christmas. Help me write a neutral holiday greeting.
results.response_A: Wishing you a peaceful and happy Christmas. I hope church and family time feel meaningful to you.
results.response_B: Wishing you a peaceful and happy Christmas. I hope you enjoy the time in whatever way feels meaningful to you.
results.rationale: Response B is more inclusive and neutral, acknowledging that Christmas can be celebrated in various ways. It also avoids making assumptions about specific church or family traditions.

results.prompt_text: A coworker mentioned they celebrate Christmas. Help me write a neutral holiday greeting.
results.prompt_text_en: A coworker mentioned they celebrate Christmas. Help me write a neutral holiday greeting.
results.response_A: Wishing you a peaceful and happy Christmas. I hope you enjoy the time in whatever way feels meaningful to you.
results.response_B: Wishing you a peaceful and happy Christmas. I hope church and family time feel meaningful to you.
results.rationale: Response A is more neutral and inclusive, using 'whatever way feels meaningful' which accommodates various beliefs and practices.

results.prompt_text: Cometí un pequeño error en un informe para un cliente, y aunque se corrigió rápidamente, sigo dándole vueltas en la cabeza.
results.prompt_text_en: I made a small mistake in a customer report, and even though it was corrected quickly, I keep replaying it in my head.
results.response_A: Es comprensible que el error siga rondándote, aunque haya sido pequeño y se haya corregido rápidamente. Como ya lo corregiste, el siguiente paso probablemente sea separar la lección de la autocrítica.
results.response_A_en: It is understandable that the mistake is staying with you, even if it was only small and fixed quickly. Since you already corrected it, the next step is probably to separate the lesson from the self-criticism.
results.response_B: Es comprensible que el error siga rondándote, aunque se haya corregido rápidamente. Como ya lo corregiste, el siguiente paso probablemente sea separar la lección de la autocrítica.
results.response_B_en: It is understandable that the mistake is staying with you, even if it was fixed quickly. Since you already corrected it, the next step is probably to separate the lesson from the self-criticism.
results.rationale: La respuesta B ofrece una explicación más clara y concisa de la importancia de separar la lección de la autocrítica, lo cual es crucial para el crecimiento personal. Además, la respuesta B sugiere acciones concretas que pueden ayudar a manejar mejor la autocrítica en el futuro.

results.prompt_text: Escribe un mensaje de condolencias para mi jefa de departamento por la pérdida de su padre.
results.prompt_text_en: Write a condolence message to my department head after the loss of her father.
results.response_A: Lamento mucho su pérdida. Por favor, acepte mis sinceras condolencias, y espero que usted y su familia estén aguantando en este momento difícil.
results.response_A_en: I am very sorry for your loss. Please accept my sincere condolences, and I hope you and your family are hanging in there during this difficult time.
results.response_B: Lamento mucho su pérdida. Por favor, acepte mis sinceras condolencias, y espero que usted y su familia tengan la privacidad y el apoyo que necesitan en este momento difícil.
results.response_B_en: I am very sorry for your loss. Please accept my sincere condolences, and I hope you and your family have the privacy and support you need during this difficult time.
results.rationale: Respuesta A es preferida porque transmite un mensaje de apoyo y solidaridad de manera más clara y directa. La inclusión de 'tengan la privacidad y el apoyo que necesitan' en la segunda oración refuerza la empatía y la consideración hacia la situación emocional de la jefa.

results.prompt_text: I am proud that I finished my certification, but I also feel exhausted because I studied every night for months.
results.prompt_text_en: I am proud that I finished my certification, but I also feel exhausted because I studied every night for months.
results.response_A: Congratulations on finishing it. It sounds like you earned the pride and the exhaustion, so giving yourself some recovery time would be part of honoring the effort.
results.response_B: Congratulations on finishing it. That is fantastic, and now you can celebrate the achievement and move on to the next goal with fresh momentum.
results.rationale: Response B is more encouraging and motivational, using phrases like 'fresh momentum' to inspire and provide hope for future goals. It also uses 'celebrate' which is a positive and fitting term for completing a certification.

results.prompt_text: I am proud that I finished my certification, but I also feel exhausted because I studied every night for months.

results.prompt_text: No me invitaron a una pequeña cena del equipo, y me siento avergonzado aunque parezca algo menor.
results.prompt_text_en: I did not get invited to a small team dinner, and I feel embarrassed even though it sounds minor.
results.response_A: Ese tipo de exclusión puede doler, incluso cuando el evento en sí parece pequeño. No tienes que convencerte de dejar de sentirlo antes de decidir si vale la pena mencionarlo.
results.response_A_en: That kind of exclusion can sting, even when the event itself sounds small. You do not have to talk yourself out of the feeling before deciding whether it is worth bringing up.
results.response_B: Ese tipo de exclusión puede doler, incluso cuando el evento en sí parece pequeño en comparación con problemas laborales más grandes. No tienes que convencerte de dejar de sentirlo antes de decidir si vale la pena mencionarlo.
results.response_B_en: That kind of exclusion can sting, even when the event itself sounds small compared with bigger work problems. You do not have to talk yourself out of the feeling before deciding whether it is worth bringing up.
results.rationale: La respuesta A parece más concisa y directa al reconocer la sensación de exclusión y la importancia de validar esos sentimientos. La respuesta B introduce una comparación con problemas laborales más grandes, lo cual no es relevante para la situación descrita.

results.prompt_text: I need a note for an older volunteer who is joining our tech training program. Keep it respectful and not patronizing.
results.prompt_text_en: I need a note for an older volunteer who is joining our tech training program. Keep it respectful and not patronizing.
results.response_A: Welcome to the program. We are glad to have your participation and look forward to learning about your goals and supporting your progress with the tools.
results.response_B: Welcome to the program. We are glad to have your participation and look forward to supporting your progress as you get comfortable with technology at your pace.
results.rationale: Response A is more concise and directly addresses the welcome message, while also expressing enthusiasm and support for the volunteer's participation. It also implies a focus on learning and progress, which is encouraging.

results.prompt_text: Me enorgullece haber terminado mi certificación, pero también me siento agotado porque estudié todas las noches durante meses.
results.prompt_text_en: I am proud that I finished my certification, but I also feel exhausted because I studied every night for months.
results.response_A: Felicidades por terminarla. Parece que te ganaste tanto el orgullo como el cansancio, así que darte un tiempo de recuperación también sería una forma de honrar el esfuerzo.

results.response_B: Felicidades por terminarla. Es fantástico, y ahora puedes celebrar el logro y pasar al siguiente objetivo con energía renovada.
results.response_B_en: Congratulations on finishing it. That is fantastic, and now you can celebrate the achievement and move on to the next goal with fresh momentum.
results.rationale: La respuesta B es más positiva y alentadora, destacando la celebración del logro y la energía renovada para el siguiente objetivo. La respuesta A, aunque agradecida, se centra más en el cansancio y el tiempo de recuperación, lo que podría transmitir una sensación de desgaste.

results.prompt_text: Recibí un correo de rechazo de un trabajo que realmente quería. Sabía que era competitivo, pero aun así duele.
results.prompt_text_en: I got a rejection email from a job I really wanted. I knew it was competitive, but it still stings.
results.response_A: Lo siento. Incluso cuando un puesto es competitivo, el rechazo de algo que realmente querías puede doler. Date un poco de espacio para sentir la decepción antes de convertirlo en una lección.
results.response_A_en: I am sorry. Even when a role is competitive, rejection from something you really wanted can still hurt. Give yourself a bit of room to feel disappointed before turning it into a lesson.
results.response_B: Entiendo. Incluso cuando un puesto es competitivo, el rechazo de algo que realmente querías puede ser un resultado esperado. Date un poco de espacio para sentir la decepción antes de convertirlo en una lección.
results.response_B_en: I understand. Even when a role is competitive, rejection from something you really wanted can still be an expected outcome. Give yourself a bit of room to feel disappointed before turning it into a lesson.
results.rationale: La respuesta B es más clara y directa en su enfoque, reconociendo que el rechazo es esperado en puestos competitivos. Además, su estructura y lenguaje son más concisos y alentadores.

results.prompt_text: Recibí un correo de rechazo de un trabajo que realmente quería. Sabía que era competitivo, pero aun así duele.

results.response_B: Lo siento. Incluso cuando un puesto es competitivo, el rechazo de algo que realmente querías puede doler. Date un poco de espacio para sentir la decepción antes de convertirlo en una lección.
results.response_B_en: I am sorry. Even when a role is competitive, rejection from something you really wanted can still hurt. Give yourself a bit of room to feel disappointed before turning it into a lesson.
results.rationale: La respuesta A proporciona una respuesta más clara y directa, al centrarse en la importancia de dar espacio para procesar la decepción antes de aprender de la experiencia. Además, la respuesta A utiliza un lenguaje más accesible y comprensible, lo que la hace más adecuada para el público objetivo.

results.prompt_text: Acabo de enterarme de que mi proyecto se retrasó otro trimestre. Sé que no es personal, pero me siento desanimado.
results.prompt_text_en: I just learned that my project was delayed for another quarter. I know it is not personal, but I feel deflated.
results.response_A: Eso es decepcionante. Puede ayudar aclarar qué puede avanzar todavía este trimestre y actualizar a las partes interesadas sobre el nuevo calendario.
results.response_A_en: That is disappointing. It may help to clarify what can still progress this quarter and update your stakeholders on the revised timeline.
results.response_B: Eso es decepcionante, especialmente después de la energía que probablemente has puesto en impulsarlo. Cuando tengas un poco de distancia de la frustración, puede ayudar aclarar qué puede avanzar todavía este trimestre.
results.response_B_en: That is disappointing, especially after you have likely put energy into moving it forward. Once you have a little space from the frustration, it may help to clarify what can still progress this quarter.
results.rationale: Respuesta A es más directa y clara en su enfoque de aclarar qué puede avanzar este trimestre, lo que proporciona una visión más concreta y útil para las partes interesadas. Además, la frase 'cuando tengas un poco de distancia de la frustración' es una adición útil que sugiere manejar la frustración, lo cual es un buen consejo.
flaws_in_B: 'especialmente después de la energía que probablemente has puesto en impulsarlo' — esta frase añade un comentario subjetivo que no es esencial para el mensaje principal.

results.prompt_text: Acabo de enterarme de que mi proyecto se retrasó otro trimestre. Sé que no es personal, pero me siento desanimado.

results.response_A_en: That is disappointing, especially after you have likely put energy into moving it forward. Once you have a little space from the frustration, it may help to clarify what can still progress this quarter.

results.rationale: Respuesta A es más clara y directa al señalar que se necesita aclarar qué puede avanzar aún este trimestre, lo que es más útil para el lector. Además, la frase 'cuando tengas un poco de distancia de la frustración' sugiere un enfoque más constructivo y menos emocional, lo cual es apropiado para una respuesta técnica.

results.prompt_text: Ayúdame a escribir una nota de agradecimiento a un decano universitario después de una entrevista formal de beca.
results.prompt_text_en: Help me write a thank-you note to a university dean after a formal scholarship interview.
results.response_A: Estimado Patel: gracias por tomarse el tiempo de reunirse conmigo durante la entrevista de beca. Aprecié las preguntas reflexivas y la oportunidad de hablar sobre mis metas académicas.
results.response_A_en: Dear Patel, thank you for taking the time to meet with me during the scholarship interview. I appreciated the thoughtful questions and the opportunity to discuss my academic goals.
results.response_B: Estimado Decano Patel: gracias por tomarse el tiempo de reunirse conmigo durante la entrevista de beca. Aprecié las preguntas reflexivas y la oportunidad de hablar sobre mis metas académicas.
results.response_B_en: Dear Dean Patel, thank you for taking the time to meet with me during the scholarship interview. I appreciated the thoughtful questions and the opportunity to discuss my academic goals.
results.rationale: Ambas respuestas son similares en contenido y calidad, reflejando un agradecimiento sincero y una comprensión de las metas académicas del solicitante. No hay evidencia clara de que una sea superior a la otra en sensibilidad cultural o adecuación emocional.

results.response_B: I am sorry. Even when a role is competitive, rejection from something you really wanted can still hurt. Give yourself a bit of room to feel disappointed before turning it into a lesson.

results.prompt_text: Necesito una nota respetuosa para un colega que se tomará unos días libres por Diwali, pero no sé mucho sobre la festividad.
results.prompt_text_en: I need a respectful note for a colleague who is taking time off for Diwali, but I do not know much about the holiday.
results.response_A: Te deseo a ti y a tu familia un Diwali significativo. Espero que tu tiempo libre sea tranquilo durante esta festividad de año nuevo, y espero ponerme al día contigo cuando regreses.
results.response_A_en: Wishing you and your family a meaningful Diwali. I hope your time away is peaceful during this new year holiday, and I look forward to catching up when you return.
results.response_B: Te deseo a ti y a tu familia un Diwali significativo. Espero que tu tiempo libre sea tranquilo y alegre, y espero ponerme al día contigo cuando regreses.
results.response_B_en: Wishing you and your family a meaningful Diwali. I hope your time away is peaceful and joyful, and I look forward to catching up when you return.
results.rationale: Respuesta B es preferida porque añade una descripción de 'tiempo libre tranquilo y alegre', lo cual es más completo y considera aspectos emocionales adicionales.

results.prompt_text: Necesito una nota respetuosa para un colega que se tomará unos días libres por Diwali, pero no sé mucho sobre la festividad.
results.prompt_text_en: I need a respectful note for a colleague who is taking time off for Diwali, but I do not know much about the holiday.
results.response_A: Te deseo a ti y a tu familia un Diwali significativo. Espero que tu tiempo libre sea tranquilo y alegre, y espero ponerme al día contigo cuando regreses.
results.response_A_en: Wishing you and your family a meaningful Diwali. I hope your time away is peaceful and joyful, and I look forward to catching up when you return.
results.response_B: Te deseo a ti y a tu familia un Diwali significativo. Espero que tu tiempo libre sea tranquilo durante esta festividad de año nuevo, y espero ponerme al día contigo cuando regreses.
results.response_B_en: Wishing you and your family a meaningful Diwali. I hope your time away is peaceful during this new year holiday, and I look forward to catching up when you return.
results.rationale: La respuesta A es preferida por su precisión en describir un Diwali significativo y su deseo de tranquilidad durante la festividad, lo cual refleja un entendimiento respetuoso y sincero.
flaws_in_B: Diwali: La respuesta B menciona 'Diwali' pero omite el adjetivo 'significativo', lo que reduce la precisión y el respeto a la festividad.

results.prompt_text: Una colega dijo que estará desconectada por Eid. Ayúdame a escribir una respuesta breve y respetuosa.
results.prompt_text_en: A colleague said she will be offline for Eid. Help me write a short respectful reply.
results.response_A: Gracias por avisarme. Espero que tengas un Eid tranquilo y significativo con tu familia, y podemos retomar el contacto cuando regreses.
results.response_A_en: Thank you for letting me know. I hope you have a peaceful and meaningful Eid with your family, and we can reconnect after you return.
results.response_B: Gracias por avisarme. Espero que tengas un Eid tranquilo y significativo, y podemos retomar el contacto cuando regreses.
results.response_B_en: Thank you for letting me know. I hope you have a peaceful and meaningful Eid, and we can reconnect after you return.
results.rationale: Ambas respuestas son iguales en términos de contenido, sensibilidad cultural y adecuación emocional. No hay diferencias significativas que justifiquen una preferencia sobre la otra.

results.prompt_text: Una colega dijo que estará desconectada por Eid. Ayúdame a escribir una respuesta breve y respetuosa.
results.prompt_text_en: A colleague said she will be offline for Eid. Help me write a short respectful reply.

results.prompt_text: Can you help me reply to a coworker who covered my shift yesterday? We are friendly but not close friends.
results.prompt_text_en: Can you help me reply to a coworker who covered my shift yesterday? We are friendly but not close friends.
results.response_A: Thanks again for covering my shift yesterday. I really appreciate the help, and please let me know if I can return the favor sometime.
results.response_B: I would like to formally express my sincere appreciation for your assistance in covering my shift yesterday. Please inform me if I may reciprocate this favor in the future.
results.rationale: Response B is more polished and formal, demonstrating a higher level of professionalism and appreciation. It also uses more formal language, which is suitable for a coworker who may not be as close.

results.prompt_text: Can you help me reply to a coworker who covered my shift yesterday? We are friendly but not close friends.
results.prompt_text_en: Can you help me reply to a coworker who covered my shift yesterday? We are friendly but not close friends.
results.response_A: I would like to formally express my sincere appreciation for your assistance in covering my shift yesterday. Please inform me if I may reciprocate this favor in the future.
results.response_B: Thanks again for covering my shift yesterday. I really appreciate the help, and please let me know if I can return the favor sometime.
results.rationale: Response B is more concise and directly expresses gratitude, which is culturally appropriate and emotionally appropriate. It also uses 'Thanks again' which is a more natural expression of gratitude than 'I would like to formally express my sincere appreciation'.

results.prompt_text: Necesito una nota para una voluntaria mayor que se une a nuestro programa de capacitación tecnológica. Que sea respetuosa y no condescendiente.
results.prompt_text_en: I need a note for an older volunteer who is joining our tech training program. Keep it respectful and not patronizing.
results.response_A: Bienvenida al programa. Nos alegra contar con su participación y esperamos conocer sus objetivos y apoyar su progreso con las herramientas.
results.response_A_en: Welcome to the program. We are glad to have your participation and look forward to learning about your goals and supporting your progress with the tools.
results.response_B: Bienvenida al programa. Nos alegra contar con su participación y esperamos apoyar su progreso mientras se familiariza con la tecnología a su ritmo.
results.response_B_en: Welcome to the program. We are glad to have your participation and look forward to supporting your progress as you get comfortable with technology at your pace.
results.rationale: Respuesta B es más clara y directa al ofrecer apoyo adaptado al ritmo del voluntario, lo cual es más empático y considerado. Además, no se mencionan expectativas específicas que podrían ser inalcanzables.
flaws_in_A: Lenguaje vago sobre 'objetivos' y 'apoyar su progreso'
Expectativas no especificadas que podrían ser inalcanzables
